behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names get_sampling_args, utils.py, orchestrator.py, scheduler.py, extra_body, return_token_ids, top_k, min_p, logprobs, min_tokens, repetition_penalty, max_tokens, and describes the new parameter naming constraints.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes behavior requirements without specifying exact code changes or line numbers.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests use _discover_vllm_param to find any non-use_token_client boolean parameter containing 'vllm' or any boolean default, accommodating alternative names like is_vllm/vllm_backend.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests extract and call get_sampling_args, checking returned dict contents.

test_not_tautological.reason: test_vllm_backend_gets_return_token_ids requires return_token_ids=True; test_non_vllm_backend_omits_vllm_keys requires the keys to be absent — a stub returning {} would fail the vLLM test.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover vLLM return_token_ids, non-vLLM omission, logprobs always True, and min_tokens/repetition_penalty preservation as specified.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with comment headers (Gates, Pass-to-pass, Fail-to-pass) and tagged with [static]/[repo_tests]/[pr_diff].

structured_data_schema.reason: No external structured data output; dict shape is described in instruction.

no_typos.reason: Filenames and identifiers are consistent across instruction, tests, and solution.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the function and callers but not exact lines; localization within the function is still needed.
